structuredContent.name: qq_engine_finish
structuredContent.label: Function
structuredContent.source:
qq_engine_finish() {
  local exit_code="$1"
  local status="$2"
  local message="$3"
  local state="${4-}"

  if [ -z "$state" ]; then
    state='{}'
  fi

  "$QQ_ENGINE_JQ" -cn \
    --arg engine "$QQ_ENGINE_NAME" \
    --arg action "$QQ_ENGINE_ACTION" \
    --arg status "$status" \
    --arg message "$message" \
    --argjson state "$state" \
    '{
      engine: $engine,
      action: $action,
      status: $status,
      message: $message,
      state: $state
    }'
  exit "$exit_code"
}
